title: microlepia plumieri
intro: Microlepia plumieri, also known as the "Polynesian sword fern" or "Polynesian fern", is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Microlepia plumieri include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and swelling, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
